channel.title: MackysTech Blog
channel.description: Expert articles on software development, cloud computing, React 19, and cybersecurity from the MackysTech engineering team.

item.title: Architecting Enterprise SaaS for 10M+ Monthly Active Users
item.description: A detailed case study of how our development team built a globally distributed web application leveraging serverless databases, edge routing, and caching.
item.author: info@mackystech.in (Mack Mackey)

item.title: Building Micro-frontends with React 19 & Vite 7
item.description: Discover how code splitting, server actions, and modern bundlers can speed up dashboard performance for enterprise applications.
item.author: info@mackystech.in (Alex Rivera)

item.title: Why We Switched to TailwindCSS V4 for Client Projects
item.description: An in-depth review of TailwindCSS version 4's new CSS-first configuration and lightning-fast compiler engine.
item.author: info@mackystech.in (Priya Sharma)

item.title: 5 Common AWS IAM Pitfalls That Expose Startup Data
item.description: Avoid wildcard policies and over-privileged roles. Learn how to audit your AWS infrastructure with standard security tools.
item.author: info@mackystech.in (Rajesh Kumar)
